languages.text: Истлевшее тело можно было бы принять за одного из меровских гвардейцев, но символ Инквизиции на груди с головой выдает аколита.
The decayed body could be mistaken for one of the Merovian guards, but the symbol of the Inquisition on his chest reveals him to be an acolyte.
languages.original_text: Истлевшее тело можно было бы принять за одного из меровских гвардейцев, но символ Инквизиции на груди с головой выдает аколита.

traits.locale_text: The decayed body could be mistaken for one of the Merovian guards, but the symbol of the Inquisition on his chest reveals him to be an acolyte.
The decayed body could be mistaken for one of the Merovian guards, but the symbol of the Inquisition on his chest reveals him to be an acolyte.
The decayed body could be mistaken for one of the Merovian guards, but the symbol of the Inquisition on his chest reveals him to be an acolyte.

languages.text: 腐敗した死体はメロヴィアンの兵士と見間違えるが、胸の宗教裁判の紋章が聖職者であることを示す。
languages.original_text: The decayed body could be mistaken for one of the Merovian guards, but the symbol of the Inquisition on his chest reveals him to be an acolyte.

traits.locale_text: 腐敗した死体はメロヴィアンの兵士と見間違えるが、胸の宗教裁判の紋章が聖職者であることを示す。

languages.text: Çürümüş ceset, Merov muhafızlarından biriyle karıştırılabilir gibi duruyor. Gelgelelim göğsündeki Engizisyon sembolü, onun bir havari olduğunu ortaya koyuyor.
languages.original_text: The decayed body could be mistaken for one of the Merovian guards, but the symbol of the Inquisition on his chest reveals him to be an acolyte.

traits.locale_text: Çürümüş ceset, Merov muhafızlarından biriyle karıştırılabilir gibi duruyor. Gelgelelim göğsündeki Engizisyon sembolü, onun bir havari olduğunu ortaya koyuyor.

languages.text: El cuerpo en descomposición podría confundirse con uno de los guardias merovianos, pero el símbolo de la Inquisición en su pecho demuestra que era un acólito.
languages.original_text: The decayed body could be mistaken for one of the Merovian guards, but the symbol of the Inquisition on his chest reveals him to be an acolyte.

traits.locale_text: El cuerpo en descomposición podría confundirse con uno de los guardias merovianos, pero el símbolo de la Inquisición en su pecho demuestra que era un acólito.

languages.text: 这具腐尸乍看像是个梅罗维卫兵，但他胸口的审判庭徽记表明，他是一名侍仆。
languages.original_text: The decayed body could be mistaken for one of the Merovian guards, but the symbol of the Inquisition on his chest reveals him to be an acolyte.

traits.locale_text: 这具腐尸乍看像是个梅罗维卫兵，但他胸口的审判庭徽记表明，他是一名侍仆。

languages.text: On pourrait croire que ce cadavre décomposé est celui d'un garde merovien, mais le symbole de l'Inquisition sur sa poitrine révèle qu'il s'agit en réalité d'un acolyte.
languages.original_text: The decayed body could be mistaken for one of the Merovian guards, but the symbol of the Inquisition on his chest reveals him to be an acolyte.

traits.locale_text: On pourrait croire que ce cadavre décomposé est celui d'un garde merovien, mais le symbole de l'Inquisition sur sa poitrine révèle qu'il s'agit en réalité d'un acolyte.

languages.text: Man könnte den verwesten Leichnam leicht für eine der merovianischen Wachen halten, aber das Symbol der Inquisition auf seiner Brust weist ihn als Akolythen aus.
languages.original_text: The decayed body could be mistaken for one of the Merovian guards, but the symbol of the Inquisition on his chest reveals him to be an acolyte.

traits.locale_text: Man könnte den verwesten Leichnam leicht für eine der merovianischen Wachen halten, aber das Symbol der Inquisition auf seiner Brust weist ihn als Akolythen aus.
